unit: Unit 12: Everyday Life with Your Mac
title: Printing and Scanning
drDigitalIntro: Printing: open a document and choose File > Print, select your printer, and click Print. Scanning: use a scanner app or your printer's scanner (if it has one). Your iPhone can act as a scanner — use Notes to scan documents instantly. PDFs are perfect for saving and sharing printed documents.
drDigitalHint: Scan documents to create digital backups.
